feed.title: SAP Community - SAP ERP
feed.subtitle: SAP ERP Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP Course Guidance as fresher MBA in SCM
entry.content:
Hi Community, I am fresher and completing my MBA in Supply chain management and joining FMCG company. 
Also I have access to SAP Student Learning Center. I want to know as a management student who is joining as executive in warehouse/DC which SAP courses should i do so that I have good learning .
Please guide me I am clueless which course to do.

entry.title: Vendor selection in third-party process
entry.content:
Hi everyone,
I'm struggling with this problem during the third-party process.
When we make a sales order, we change the item category in ZTAS. That is the correct value for this process.
For material Z1, we can have two vendors.
The source list is maintained for vendor A and B, and A (EU vendor) is defined as fixed, while the second, B (non-EU), is not fixed. The info record is maintained also.
When we create a sales order for a specific customer , we would like the system to always select vendor B instead of A for the PR, as it is closer to the customer.
We can change the vendor manually , sure, but if the sales order has more than 200 lines, it is a very big effort.
Is there any workaround to achieve this scope without an ABAP program?

Gil

entry.title: Production Engineer
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am reaching out as a new community member seeking a guide on which SAP product is befitting of a production engineer. I have an experience using SAP HANA S/4 PM organized by my company (in-house).

I would like to get certified by SAP directly or affiliates in all SAP products relating to production and process engineering and become a SME.

PS: I am working presently in Saudi Arabia

Thanks for your assistance.

Cheers.

entry.title: TR Capturing objects in Development but not appearing when moved to Quality System
entry.content:
Hi All,

While doing STPI and STAPI upgrade there are some SPAU and SPDD Adjustments now the developer has captured the spau and spdd changes in some TR the changes captured captured can be seen in SE03 but while trasnferring the changes in the quality system the changes are not coming for all the other landscapes its working fine but for this particulat landscape its not working can anyone please let me know what could be the reason for it. Attaching the Screenshot.

The above is our OBD System as we can see the changes are captured and the subtask and TR are released

The above is our quality system as we can see the changes are not coming any idea what we are doing wrong.

entry.title: S/4 Hana - Track on SO schedule line level both requested delivery date and committed delivery date
entry.content:
Hello, 

I am working for a Make to Order scenario project, my customer wants to trace in the sales order just for statistical purpose at schedule line level both  the initial requested delivery date of the customer and also the committed date (if the date requested by the customer is not feasible).

In the sales order there is not availability check and are not configured lead times; the Customer care should enter manually the requested delivery date for each sales order item (also eventually splitting quantity on different dates), then if after discussion with Planning the date is not feasible the Customer care will enter for each schedule line previously defined the committed date (the date on which the company commits to the customer to deliver the product).

There is any standard solution to satisfy this requirement? Otherwise I am thinking to add a new custom field "committed date" on schedule line tab of the sales order.

Thanks in advance for your help.

entry.title: Changing Stock Status from Quality Inspection to Unrestricted
entry.content:
I would like to inquire about a specific issue regarding stock status. Currently, our inventory is in "Quality Inspection" status, but there is no corresponding quality inspection lot available, which prevents us from using transaction QA32.

We need to change the stock status from "Quality Inspection" to "Unrestricted." Could you please advise on the steps required to transfer this inventory to an unrestricted status?

We attempted to use MIGO to perform a 321 inspection in order to change the stock status to Unrestricted, but we encountered an error message stating, "You can only change the inspection stock for material XXXXXXX in Quality Management.(只有在品質管理中更改物料XXXXXXXXXX檢驗庫存)"

entry.title: Execute LI20 in inventory stock
entry.content:
I would like to ask about the difference stock in our inventory. If we execute the difference stock with LI20, is that stock automatically move to 999 storage type ?

or we balance the difference stock in LX17 first then execute with LI20.

pls help and thanks a lot for your replies.

Didin

entry.title: Multiple issue delivery outputs
entry.content:
Dear SAP Gurus,

On the VL03N initial screen, after I type in the outbound delivery number, I click "Outbound Delivery", then "Issue Delivery output", "Print preview" and the system generates a file that I can save or print. We use this process to generate "Delivery acceptance protocols" for deliveries of our goods.

My question is - is there any way to generate such files/protocols for multiple outbound deliveries at once so I don't have to go through the full process for every single delivery.

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: ABAP Runtime Error on Project
entry.content: Reservation generated from a specific network in WBS. User wants to create PR instead of a reservation. Now, when user tried to change the item category for component in network system gave ABAP runtime error.  Ever since this, nothing can be changed or even displayed in the project. Project is opened in CJ20N but instantly system gives ABAP runtime error. What to do?

entry.title: SAP Cloud ERP: Topics on models, projects & licensing
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I came across a free online event focused on SAP Cloud ERP that covers practical topics such as:

  • Public vs. private cloud models
  • Finance automation & AI use cases
  • Real project experiences and implementation challenges
  • Functional scope in areas like maintenance
  • Licensing & subscription considerations

It includes speakers from SAP and related experts. In case this is useful for anyone: SAP Cloud ERP Tag 2026 - Fink IT-Solutions

Just sharing - maybe interesting for some of you.

Best,
Julia

entry.title: how to change the communication address in Equipment master?
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have the requirement to update the address details in the Equipment master IE03. I've used this BAPI(ADDR_UPDATE) to update the address Name1, Name2, and related fields, which are getting updated. But unable to update the below mentioned fields. Please suggest to me how update the telephone number and fax number related fields.

Thanks,

Naveenkumar.K

entry.title: KP06 P&L Showing changes to the original FC3 rather than new values
entry.content:
I have upload forecast values using ZCO_KPO6 for FC6

When i run a P&L it shows the difference to the first version of FC6 i loaded rather than the new values.

The correct values are showing on KSBP and S_ALR_87013611 but not the P&L or TB_OPS

I have followed the same process used for previous years and forecast which all usually work fine.

Any help is appreciated

entry.title: Deleting Wage Type Never Used
entry.content:
Hello,

We created a new wage type last month and moved it to production. We then found out it was no longer needed. Since the wage type has never been used (not entered on any info-types), is it ok to delete it and transport the "delete" change to production? In SAP Help docs, I see its recommended to never delete a wage type, but rather to delimit it on T512Z/T512W. But wanted to confirm if that recommendation applies to a wage type that has zero usage, and that if we do proceed, I can do so by deleting it in test and transport it to production.

Thank you,

Mae

entry.title: Historical Revision level on POs
entry.content: Which transaction can I use to see the last revision level of a material placed in a PO (I want to see this in a massive way)

entry.title: A customer requested to downgrade some set of users from Advanced users to Core users.
entry.content:
A customer requested to downgrade some set of users from Advanced users to Core users. And this request is coming from SAP S/4Hana Cloud Public Edition. I know in Private cloud you will use USMM/SLAW tool, in Public cloud, I know it is SAP that manages it. But I need guidance on how to go about it (downgrade users). 

Scenario 2: In my research, I discovered I have to remove app/tiles (associated catalogs) from a user. The user has 120 apps, is there a tool to know which Fiori apps makes a user Advanced user, as it is tedious work to remove and check over and over again if user has changed to Core user.

Regards,

Benjamin.

entry.title: An error occurred while executing the operation.
entry.content:
Hello,

I get "An error occurred while executing the operation." massage when I press the "I acept" button in the terms and conditions.

entry.title: The quantity was copied as double
entry.content:
The quantity on the quotation was 6 pieces before creating the subsequent order. After I created the subsequent order, it became 12 pieces. The quantity was copied as double. Is this possible? I don’t remember changing the quantity manually.
 
I have checked MM03, and there are no settings related to the unit of measure, delivery unit, or rounding

entry.title: Training on SAP ERP Implementation
entry.content:
Hello,
I am looking for a training or introductory training course on SAP ERP implementation.

Please let me know whether any course is available online or offline.

Thank you for your support.

entry.title: France : electronic invoice routing address
entry.content:
Hello,

We are currently implementing electronic invoicing for French customers. Our client has opted for an external PDP (Plateforme de Dématérialisation Partenaire) and does not have a subscription to SAP DRC (Document and Reporting Compliance).

We are looking for a clean and sustainable solution to maintain the electronic invoice routing address (routing code/SIREN_SUFFIX,SIRET_SIRET,ect...) within the Customer Master Data.

Could you provide the current best practices or recommendations for customers running under SAP ECC or S/4HANA on-premises in this specific context?

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: ADP GlobalView Acess to Terminated Employees
entry.content:
Hello,

I’m reaching out to understand how other organizations manage access for terminated employees to their payslips, tax documents, and other historical records in ADP GlobalView.

Specifically, we would like to learn:

  1. How do you provide access to former employees after their work accounts are disabled?

    • Do they continue accessing ADP GlobalView through a self-service portal?
    • Do you extend access for a certain period, or do you remove access immediately?

  2. Are former employees allowed to update their login details from their previous work email to a personal email address to retrieve their documents?

    • If yes, how is this handled during offboarding?
    • Are there any controls or verification steps to ensure identity validation?

  3. Do you offer any alternative delivery methods (e.g., email, physical mail, dedicated HR request process) for providing payslips and tax documents to terminated employees?

Any insights, best practices, or process examples would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you,
Jess
